title: Samara, Samara Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Samara, Samara Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Samara is a city in Samara Oblast with a population of 1,150,000. A major Volga River port and aerospace manufacturing hub, home to the Samara Space Museum and scenic riverfront.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
